_note: Channel manifest for recursive.eco. Makes this repo self-describing: recursive.eco imports it as a channel by reading this file from raw.githubusercontent.com/{{GITHUB_OWNER}}/{{GITHUB_REPO}}/<default_branch>/recursive-eco.json. Declares the channel identity (rendered as a channel-document, document_data.is_channel=true), where its grammars live (grammars/<slug>/grammar.json), and the slug->UUID map (ids.json). Mirrors recursive-tarot/recursive-eco.json and recursive-astrology/recursive-eco.json — this file is the pattern, templatized. See recursive-eco/docs/DESIGN-import-channel-from-github.md.

hero.title: {{CHANNEL_NAME}}
hero.subtitle: {{CHANNEL_DESCRIPTION}}
hero.body_md: REPLACE-ME: one or two paragraphs introducing the channel — what it is, what creed or stance it holds (a grammar is a mirror to think with, never a command to obey), and what makes this domain's grammars worth reading.

grammars._exclude_note: List any generated/meta/reference grammars here that should NOT import as channel members (e.g. an auto-built 'all-grammars' index). Empty is fine for a new channel.
